data.body: Investigated (debug-everything 2026-04-28): Root cause: pre-commit auto-stash transforms the working tree before hook execution, causing the hash observer at commit-time to see a different state than the hash recorder saw. Workaround (documented in bug): git stash --keep-index before the recording step. Proper fix requires making the hash computation staged-only (ignoring unstaged files) so the recorded hash matches what pre-commit auto-stash will leave. Complex behavioral change — deferring for dedicated sprint.
